name: Deviled Eggs & Noodles
recipeInstructions: Prepare Deviled Eggs according to Recipe 19. Cover and microwave onion and margarine in a 1.5-Qt casserole on high until onion is tender, about 1.5 to 2 minutes. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and microwave until hot, 5 to 6 minutes. Arrange eggs on noodles. Cover and microwave until eggs are hot, 1 to 2 minutes.
